title: Verify 'Set a Reminder' happy path for an eligible user
description: Test that a user who has not watched content within 5 minutes of starting a trial sees the Trial Corner and can successfully set a 24-hour reminder.
preconditions: User has not consumed any content within the first 5 minutes of trial activation.
User is on the app homepage.

steps.description: 1. Observe the 'Trial Mode' widget on the homepage.
2. Click the widget to navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub.
4. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends.'
5. Verify the 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with 'trial corner' as page source.

expected_result: The toggle activates successfully, a confirmation message is shown, and the system is set to send a notification 24 hours before the trial ends. The analytics event is correctly logged.
